query:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.gaId,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN 1 END) as non_zero_count,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN m.weight END) * 100, 2) as avg_weight_pct
FROM competencies c
LEFT JOIN mappings m ON c.id = m.competencyId
LEFT JOIN plos p ON m.ploId = p.id
WHERE p.programId = 20
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.gaId
ORDER BY c.code;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN 1 END) as non_zero_count,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN m.weight END) * 100, 2) as avg_weight_pct
FROM competencies c
LEFT JOIN mappings m ON c.id = m.competencyId
LEFT JOIN plos p ON m.ploId = p.id
WHERE p.programId = 20
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.gaId
ORDER BY c.code;
